name: rest-api-collector
description: Polls REST API endpoints for new data. Supports GET/POST, multiple authentication schemes, pagination strategies, and incremental deduplication.
author: hermes-core

base_url.title: Base URL
base_url.description: Root URL of the API (e.g. https://api.example.com/v1). Recipe paths are appended to this value.

auth_type.title: Authentication Type
auth_type.description: Authentication scheme used for all outbound requests

auth_token.title: Auth Token / API Key
auth_token.description: Token, password, or API key used for authentication (combined with auth_type)

default_headers.title: Default Headers
default_headers.description: Static HTTP headers included in every request (key: header name, value: header value)

timeout_seconds.title: Request Timeout (seconds)
timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for a response

poll_interval.title: Poll Interval
poll_interval.description: Duration between polling cycles in Go-style duration syntax (e.g. 30s, 5m, 1h)

retry_max_attempts.title: Retry Max Attempts
retry_max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts on transient HTTP errors (5xx, timeouts)

retry_delay_seconds.title: Retry Delay (seconds)
retry_delay_seconds.description: Initial delay in seconds between retry attempts (exponential backoff applied)

path.title: API Path
path.description: URL path appended to base_url for each poll request (e.g. /orders/list)

method.title: HTTP Method
method.description: HTTP verb used for the poll request

query_params.title: Query Parameters
query_params.description: Static query string parameters appended to every request URL

request_body.title: Request Body
request_body.description: Static JSON body sent with POST/PUT requests

records_path.title: Records Path
records_path.description: JSONPath or dot-notation path to the array of records within the API response (e.g. data.items). Leave empty if the response root is the array.

pagination_type.title: Pagination Type
pagination_type.description: Pagination strategy used to fetch all pages of results

pagination_config.title: Pagination Configuration
pagination_config.description: Parameters controlling pagination behavior; applicable fields depend on pagination_type

page_param.title: Page Parameter Name
page_param.description: Query parameter name for the page number (offset pagination)

size_param.title: Page Size Parameter Name
size_param.description: Query parameter name for the page size (offset pagination)

page_size.title: Page Size
page_size.description: Number of records to request per page

cursor_field.title: Cursor Field
cursor_field.description: Response field containing the next-page cursor value (cursor pagination)

next_link_path.title: Next Link Path
next_link_path.description: JSONPath to the next-page URL within the response body (link pagination)

dedup_key_field.title: Deduplication Key Field
dedup_key_field.description: Field within each record used to detect already-seen records across polls (leave empty to disable)

max_records_per_poll.title: Max Records Per Poll
max_records_per_poll.description: Maximum total number of records collected in a single poll cycle across all pages (0 = unlimited)
